title: Back Up the Data
text: Back Up the Data Back up the data before installing the SYB connector. Perform the following steps on the existing installation to copy the data from the Repository. Back up all data using the Sybase dump facility. Export the tables of the Repository. If the Repository is stored in Sybase, the data must be exported by using the Convert Data form. Export all the tables for your modeled entities using the Convert Data form. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
